title: U.S. Election Records (PolitiFinder)
description: The most striking records in U.S. election history — biggest landslides, closest races, most votes, the presidents who won while losing the popular vote, the youngest and oldest senators, strongest third-party runs, and career popular-vote leaders (named-candidate basis) — across President, U.S. Senate, U.S. House, and Governor. One row per record; names and public URLs only. Every record reconciles to its page at https://politifinder.com/rankings. Compiled by PolitiFinder (137 Finder LLC).
